title: N-PAMP draft-01 handshake-flow conformance KAT vector
description: Schema for the byte-pinned handshake-flow conformance vector (issue #60). Class golden-interop: unlike the standards-anchored primitive/transcript/finished/certverify/kem-wire KATs, this vector pins the SERIALIZED on-wire handshake FRAMES (CLIENT_HELLO/SERVER_HELLO/SERVER_AUTH/CLIENT_AUTH) so every language impl reproduces them byte-for-byte from six fixed seeds. Profile Standard, SHA-256, AES-256-GCM. The ML-KEM ciphertext is captured-once and pinned as a self-validating INPUT (crypto/mlkem has no seed-injectable encapsulation); each verifier decapsulates it and recovers mlkem_shared_secret. Non-circularity: the generator drives the real reference code path to produce the bytes AND re-derives every EXPECTED field a second time via an independent inline oracle (hand-built TLV byte construction + raw crypto/hkdf + crypto/hmac + crypto/sha256), failing on any disagreement.

class.description: Pins Go-reference wire bytes for cross-impl byte-for-byte agreement (not standards-anchored KAT bytes).

spec.description: Spec anchor; MUST reference N-PAMP draft-01.

profile.description: N-PAMP profile; Standard pins SHA-256 / HashLen 32.

hash.description: KDF/transcript hash for the Standard profile.

aead.description: AEAD suite (0x0001) sealing the SERVER_AUTH / CLIENT_AUTH frames.

provenance.description: Why this vector is trustworthy: produced by the real reference path AND cross-checked against an independent inline oracle.

inputs.description: The six fixed seeds that fully determine the flow, plus the captured-once ML-KEM ciphertext and the three shared-secret self-check targets.

client_x25519_private.description: RFC 7748 alice_private (reused from kem-wire-kat); 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

server_x25519_private.description: RFC 7748 bob_private (reused from kem-wire-kat); 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

mlkem768_seed_dz.description: ML-KEM-768 FIPS 203 d||z seed (reused from kem-wire-kat); 64 bytes as 128 hex chars.

mlkem_ciphertext.description: Captured-once ML-KEM-768 ciphertext (1088 bytes) as 2176 hex chars. Self-validating input: decapsulating it under mlkem768_seed_dz MUST recover mlkem_shared_secret.

client_identity_ed25519_seed.description: Fixed 32-octet Ed25519 seed for the client identity key (ed25519.NewKeyFromSeed); 64 hex chars.

server_identity_ed25519_seed.description: Fixed 32-octet Ed25519 seed for the server identity key (ed25519.NewKeyFromSeed); 64 hex chars.

mlkem_shared_secret.description: ML-KEM-768 shared secret recovered by decapsulating mlkem_ciphertext; 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

x25519_shared_secret.description: X25519 shared secret (client_priv x server_pub); 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

combined_secret.description: ML-KEM-first combined IKM = mlkem_shared_secret || x25519_shared_secret; 64 bytes as 128 hex chars.

expected.description: Every byte-pinned artifact of the flow, all lowercase hex.

frames.description: Full on-wire frame bytes (36-octet header || payload; AUTH payloads AEAD-sealed).

auth_plaintext.description: The AUTH TLV plaintext (IdentityKey||CertVerify||Finished) sealed inside each AUTH frame.

transcript.description: The five spec/10 §3 transcript-hash cut points; 32 bytes each.

secrets.description: The spec/10 §5 key ladder. All handshake/master secrets and traffic secrets are 32 bytes (64 hex); keys 32 bytes (64 hex); ivs 12 bytes (24 hex).

finished_keys.description: Finished MAC keys derived from s_hs_secret (server) / c_hs_secret (client); 32 bytes each.

finished.description: Finished verify_data: HMAC-SHA256(finished_key, TH_sCV/TH_cCV); 32 bytes each.

cert_verify.description: CertVerify TLV values: SignatureScheme uint16 (0x0807) || Ed25519 signature (64); 66 bytes = 132 hex chars each.

kem.description: The KEM wire fields carried in CLIENT_HELLO / SERVER_HELLO.

kem_share.description: TLV 0x07 value: ML-KEM ek (1184) || client X25519 public (32) = 1216 bytes = 2432 hex chars.

kem_ciphertext.description: TLV 0x08 value: ML-KEM ciphertext (1088) || server X25519 public (32) = 1120 bytes = 2240 hex chars.
